title: stelis bicarinata
intro: Stelis bicarinata is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, specifically found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds. The health benefits of Stelis bicarinata include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Stelis bicarinata typically involve boiling the plant material in water to make a tea or infusion, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
